repository_ssim: St. Catherine's Monastery of the Sinai
full_text_tesim: Not foliated; sequence follows Brock 1995, pl. 446-449
Large capital letters in margin and blank lines used for separating paragraphs
Medieval CPA; cursive script that employs the features and structure of ancient script style
Consists of two components: one original folio, reused as binding material, and the remnant of a folio, also reused as binding material
